title: X402 Accepted Payment Methods Configuration
description: Configuration schema for Pro API x402_accepted_payment_methods_config.json. Top-level keys are CAIP-2 network identifiers; second-level keys are ERC-20 token contract addresses. Each leaf object describes one accepted X402 payment method.

^[-a-z0-9]{3,8}:[-_a-zA-Z0-9]{1,32}$.description: Payment methods accepted on this CAIP-2 network. Keys are ERC-20 token contract addresses.

^0x[a-fA-F0-9]{40}$.description: One accepted X402 payment method (one network + asset combination).

scheme.description: X402 payment scheme advertised to clients (e.g. 'exact').

network.description: CAIP-2 network id; must match the parent map key.

asset.description: ERC-20 token contract address; must match the inner map key.

payTo.description: Recipient address that should receive the token transfer.

maxTimeoutSeconds.description: Maximum time window (seconds) forwarded to clients in the payment requirement.

extra.description: Arbitrary metadata forwarded to clients as-is (e.g. EIP-712 name/version for transferWithAuthorization tokens like USDC).

usd_per_token.description: USD price of one whole token (human units, not wei). Used with billing credits and decimals to compute the on-chain amount at request time.

decimals.description: ERC-20 decimals of the token (e.g. 6 for USDC).
